caption: In the video, a person is engaged in a crafting activity on a grid-lined work surface. They are using a glue stick to apply adhesive to a piece of white paper with a scalloped edge. The person carefully applies the glue along the edge of the paper, ensuring even coverage. Various crafting materials are visible around the workspace, including patterned papers, a stamping tool, and other supplies. The person's hands are steady and precise as they work, indicating experience and attention to detail in their craft project. The focus remains on the hands and the paper throughout the sequence, highlighting the meticulous process of preparing the paper for further assembly or decoration.
